violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed without proper hair restraint. All line cooks or preparers must wear some kind of hair restraint. Cap(s) etc.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach-in-freezer needs cleaned of food debris.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Single use items (cups) need to be stored off the floor in back storage room.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities Floors in cooking area were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
